formations_blocks: Paraguay not pressing early; passive defensive setup
USA patient possession in their own half before advancing
adjustments: USA maintaining short-passing possession after winning free kicks
Paraguay needing a revised plan to contain Pulisic after early one-vs-one issues
key_matchups: McKennie and Balogun combining against Paraguay's back line
phases.summary: The opening phase was defined by Paraguay initially sitting off and allowing the USA to build in possession, while the Americans mixed patient circulation with direct balls into McKennie and Balogun. USA’s attacking pressure quickly told, as Pulisic repeatedly threatened Cáceres and helped force the opening own goal, putting Paraguay immediately on the back foot.

formations_blocks: USA sustained possession and pressure in the attacking half
Paraguay under pressure while building from the back
Paraguay briefly enjoyed a good spell of possession before USA reasserted control
adjustments: USA added numbers on the left side of attack, with Robinson joining Pulisic and the midfield
Tillman and McKennie pushed up to combine with Pulisic on the left
Paraguay did not yet make a clear tactical adjustment in the text, despite the brief hydration-break window
phases.summary: This phase was defined by the USA gradually seizing control through repeated left-sided attacks and aggressive pressure on Paraguay’s back line. Pulisic repeatedly beat Cáceres, while Balogun and the supporting midfield runners kept turning possession into dangerous entries, culminating in Balogun’s 31' goal. Paraguay had an early possession spell and briefly responded, but they were largely overwhelmed and looked unsettled by the USA’s tempo and confidence.

formations_blocks: off-ball movement causing pressure on Paraguay
phases.summary: USA led 3-0 at halftime after a highly dynamic, confident first half built on quality in possession and constant off-ball movement. Paraguay were unable to settle into a rigid structure or get time on the ball, with their defenders and midfielders repeatedly exposed and unable to complete passes.

formations_blocks: USA long spells of possession in the Paraguayan half
Paraguay sending everyone forward on a free kick
Paraguay showing signs of a more competent attacking phase after the break
adjustments: Paraguay briefly commit numbers forward after 45'+2
USA continue to play deep in Paraguay's half after halftime
Paraguay attempt to turn pressure into more direct attacking moments
key_matchups: Tillman vs Paraguay midfield pressure/dispossession attempts
Diego Gómez vs USA defensive recovery after a giveaway
phases.summary: The game resumed with the USA still controlling territory and possession, pinning Paraguay deep and creating repeated defensive actions from the visitors. Paraguay responded by pushing more bodies forward and briefly looked sharper, but their attacking play was undermined by turnovers and poor execution. The phase’s major swing was the 50' incident, where Almiron drew a second yellow for simulation, leaving Paraguay frustrated despite a few improved moments and a late warning shot from Diego Gómez.

formations_blocks: US in sustained possession/high territory after 75'
Paraguay defending in a loose, disorganized block and sitting under pressure
Paraguay attempting occasional counters/through balls after recovering possession
adjustments: Paraguay make triple change: Sosa for Almiron, Gustavo Velazquez for Caceres, Gamarra for Gomez
Paraguay’s shape appears to lose cohesion as the period wears on
key_matchups: Tillman vs Paraguay goalkeeper on the 75' chance
Weah vs Gill on the 77' deflected shot
Pepi disrupting Paraguay possession and winning a foul
Reyna entering in place of Tillman
phases.summary: This phase is dominated by the USA keeping the ball in Paraguay’s half while Paraguay’s defensive structure repeatedly breaks down. The visitors do create brief moments of pressure and one nearly dangerous through ball, but the US largely control the territory and continue to generate chances, including Tillman’s missed opportunity and Weah’s deflected effort. Late substitutions do little to alter the flow, and Reyna’s introduction comes as the USA seek to close the game out before the late fourth goal.
